B.E. Junior student at ZJU-UIUC in Computer Engineering

Blog: Comming Soon

About Me

I am Yuxuan Jiang (Matt), a junior student in CompE at ZJU-UIUC institute. Currently my research interest is in distributed systems, high performance, etc.

Education

ZJU-UIUC Institute

B.E. in Computer Engineering at both University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign and Zhejiang University

2019 - 2023

The program is offered by the partnership between Zhejiang University and the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign (UIUC). All non-political curriculums and resources are imported from UIUC. Core courses are present by UIUC professors and lectures.

University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign

Exchange at UIUC

2022 - 2023

The exchange program is offered for ZJU-UIUC students to better explore possibilities in their future careers and to enjoy a much wider range of academic resources.

Projects

DepFast

Fail-slow fault tolerance needs programming support

2021

Previously published workshop paper

The research is ongoing.

My work mainly focused on testing fault-slow tolerance of PolarDB-for-PostgreSQL (PolarDB for short) during 2021 “UIUC Undergraduate Summer Research” program. Future work to be added.

BSP-based Data Replication Processing in Distributed Databases

2021

The research is ongoing.

This is a SRTP project that explores applications of BSP algorithms in distributed databases, guided by Klaus-Dieter Schewe.

Awards

Provincial Gold Award

Internet+ Innovation and Entrepreneurship Competition (Zhejiang Province)

2021

“Distributed High Performance Computing” (D-HPC for short).
The project aims to provide highly-available and low-latency computational services in the city by deploying a distributed supercomputer network. D-HPC supports the construction of “Smart City” and “Industrial Network”. It also make user experience better in terms of cloud-based apps, such as cloud-gaming. It also values data-uniqueness and the user’s sovereignty of data by integrating the blockchain technology into the network. We also aim to accelerate the age of Web3.0.

First Prize

International Concrete Dragon Boat Competition

2020

Designer of the control system.

Second National Prize

ChangFeng National Contest in Big Data Analysis and Mining

2021
